location_full: Gestala's growth is driven by the leadership of serial entrepreneur Phoenix Peng, Ph.D., who previously raised over RMB 350 million for NeuroXess. The $21 million Seed round in March 2026 represents a major inflection point, providing the runway needed to scale from benchtop prototypes to wearable and implantable product lines. The company is currently in an active hiring phase to support its expanding workforce and clinical research efforts. Growth is further evidenced by its rapid transition from theoretical RTT methods to measurable clinical results with the Diadem system. Having already established partnerships with major health institutions like University of Utah Health, Gestala's trajectory indicates a shift from early R&D toward regulatory compliance and broader clinical deployment within the next 12-18 months.

description: BRILL Neurotech is developing a new generation of non-invasive brain imaging technology designed to measure the Fast Optical Signal (FOS), a neural signal associated with rapid changes in neuronal activity. By combining advances in optoelectronics, precision electronics, and neuroscience, BRILL aims to enable real-time measurement of brain activity with both high temporal resolution and improved spatial localization. The company is building hardware systems that support neuroscience research, brain-computer interface development, and future neurotechnology applications. BRILL's long-term vision is to create platforms that expand our ability to study the brain and develop new ways for humans to interact with machines.
